findings.description: The #aside CSS code example is truncated. The knowledge file shows only `.grid-col(16);` inside #aside, but the source includes `min-height: 350px;`, `padding-top: 15px;`, and the `li a { display: block; width: 100%; padding: 5px 10px; }` block. These are part of the complete default configuration that users would reference when copying/modifying the plugin.

Several @variable names from the nablarch-css-conf-multicol CSS configuration block are missing from hints: @trackWidth, @gutterWidth, @totalWidth, @labelGridSpan, @inputGridSpan, @buttonGridSpan, @unitGridSpan, @contentWidth. Users asking about these specific variables (e.g., 'how do I change the grid width?') may not be routed to this section.
